name: senior-fe-interview-book
description: A book on AWS, modern React/Next.js, Angular basics, Node.js (Express/Fastify/NestJS), REST, auth, security, and frontend production for senior frontend interview prep.

scripts.print:setup: puppeteer browsers install chrome-headless-shell && puppeteer browsers install chrome
scripts.print:render: pnpm print:stage && cd print && quarto render
scripts.print:preview: pnpm print:stage && cd print && quarto preview
